hindi: व्यालोकित त्रिभुवनं विरचय्य कर्म, सर्वं जगत्तव पदाम्बुजमाश्रयन्ते।
english: After surveying the three worlds and conducting all its actions, the whole world takes refuge at your lotus feet
roman: Vyalokita tribhuvanam virachayya karma, sarvam jagattava padambujam ashrayante

hindi: धत्ते सदैव हृदये तव पादपद्मं, योऽनन्यभावितमना स जयत्यनन्तम्॥
english: He who always holds your lotus feet in his heart with undivided mind conquers the infinite
roman: Dhatte sadaiva hridaye tava padapadmam, yo ananya bhavita mana sa jayatyanantam

english: With a body golden-red as vermilion, adorned with ornaments, a true lotus as his crown with the moon gleaming above
roman: Sindura gaura tanum abharanair vibhusham, sat padma maulim upari sphuritendubimbam

hindi: दन्तं त्रिशूलमभयं वरदं च हस्तैः, श्रीगणराजमभयप्रदमाश्रयामः॥
english: Holding tusk, trident, the gesture of fearlessness and boon-giving in his hands — we take refuge in the glorious Ganesha who grants fearlessness
roman: Dantam trishulam abhayam varadam cha hastaih, Shri Ganarajam abhaya pradam ashrayamah

hindi: मोदं करोति सततं मुनिचित्तमूर्तिः, श्रीविघ्नराजभवनं करुणापयोधिः।
english: The one whose form eternally delights the minds of sages, the abode of Lord Vignaraja, ocean of compassion
roman: Modam karoti satatam muni chitta murtihi, Shri Vighna raja bhavanam karunapa yodhih

english: The infinite son of Shankara, of infinite power — we take refuge in the glorious Ganesha who grants fearlessness
roman: Shri Shankaratmajam anantam ananta shaktim, Shri Ganarajam abhaya pradam ashrayamah

english: Whoever reads this Ashtakam of Ganesha with devotion
roman: Ashtakam idam Ganeshaya yah pathet bhakti samyutah

hindi: विद्यां धनं यशो राज्यं सुखं पुत्रादिसम्पदम्॥
english: Attains learning, wealth, fame, sovereignty, happiness and the blessings of children and all prosperity
roman: Vidyam dhanam yasho rajyam sukham putradi sampadam
